0.response: {"Q0":"I didn't use any specific strategy, just focused on the planets that gave me gems then once the astronaut left I only focused on the remaining planet. For the meteor shower I mainly just focused on getting the gem that was able to be sold and ignored the green thing since it was random."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I balanced between odds and higher reward, I feel that if both options were above 50% odds then I would usually go for the higher rewarded unless it was only 1 dollar higher or so."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No, the examples and trials helped make everything easy to understand."}

6.response: {"Q0":"No, since the gems couldn't be sold there was no reason to collect the gems."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I was focused more on the pair of galaxies since not answering them in time would harm me greater then losing a chance at a planet's gem."}
